'''√sh-y-b''' ('''kashayab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cultipack|cultipack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cultipack|cultipack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| kashayab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishayab || jishayab || shishayab || kishayab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushayab || jujushayab || shushushayab || kukushayab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushayab || jushayab || shushayab || kushayab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushayab || jushayab || shushayab || kushayab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshayab || jeshayab || sheshayab || keshayab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshayab || jojoshayab || shoshoshayab || kokoshayab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshayab || joshayab || shoshayab || koshayab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshayab || joshayab || shoshayab || koshayab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shayab || shayab || shayab || shayab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shayab || shayab || shayab || shayab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shayab || shayab || shayab || shayab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shayab || shayab || shayab || shayab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshayab || jæshayab || shæshayab || kæshayab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashayab || jajashayab || shashashayab || kakashayab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashayab || jashayab || shashayab || kashayab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashayab || jashayab || shashayab || kashayab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashayab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashayab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashayab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashayabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashayabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashayabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashayabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashayabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashayabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashayabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashayabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashayabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashayabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashayabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashayabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashayabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashayabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashayabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashayabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashayabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashayabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashayabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashayabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashayabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashayabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashayabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashayabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashayabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashayabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashayabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashayabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashayabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashayabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashayabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashayabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashayabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashayabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashayabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashayabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashayabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashayabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashayabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashayabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashayabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashayabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashayabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashayabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashayabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashayabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashayabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashayabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashayabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashayabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashayabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashayabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashayabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashayabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashayabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashayabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashayabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashayabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashayabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashayabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
